query:
INSERT INTO map_routes (sheetId, title, notes, category, color, points, photos) 
VALUES (
  1, 
  'OPALCO Underground Power Line',
  'Underground power service from OPALCO (Orcas Power & Light Co).\n\n**Circuit:** 2241317FO\n**Source:** Deer Harbor Substation\n**Service:** Underground from Bear Cove Rd to main electrical panel\n\n**OPALCO Power Map:** [View PDF](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/propmanual-5wh7ynui/OPALCOpowermap.pdf)\n\n**CAUTION:** Do not excavate along Bear Cove Rd or driveway without calling 811 (Dig Safe) first.\n\nContact OPALCO: (360) 376-3500 | opalco.com',
  'electrical',
  '#eab308',
  '[{"x":8.5,"y":89.0},{"x":8.0,"y":82.0},{"x":8.5,"y":74.0},{"x":10.0,"y":65.0},{"x":12.0,"y":57.0},{"x":16.0,"y":50.0},{"x":22.0,"y":47.0},{"x":30.0,"y":44.0},{"x":40.0,"y":43.0},{"x":50.0,"y":44.0},{"x":57.0,"y":46.0}]',
  '["https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/propmanual-5wh7ynui/OPALCOpowermap.pdf"]'
);
